## Variables

<table><thead><tr><th>

Variable


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

[DEFAULT\_IMQ\_OPTIONS](/api/core/latest/core.default_imq_options/)


</td><td>


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[DEFAULT\_UDP\_CLUSTER\_MANAGER\_OPTIONS](/api/core/latest/core.default_udp_cluster_manager_options/)


</td><td>


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[IMQ\_CONNECTION\_QUIT\_TIMEOUT](/api/core/latest/core.imq_connection_quit_timeout/)


</td><td>

Grace period (ms) for a graceful QUIT to complete before a channel is forcibly disconnected. A reader blocked on an infinite BRPOP/BLMOVE can never let QUIT through, so without this the socket would leak and keep the process alive.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[IMQ\_LOG\_ARGS](/api/core/latest/core.imq_log_args/)


</td><td>

Environment variable IMQ\_LOG\_ARGS=\[1, 0\]. Enable or disable logging of profiled call arguments.

 {<!-- -->boolean<!-- -->}


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[IMQ\_LOG\_LEVEL](/api/core/latest/core.imq_log_level/)


</td><td>


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[IMQ\_LOG\_TIME\_FORMAT](/api/core/latest/core.imq_log_time_format/)


</td><td>

Environment variable IMQ\_LOG\_TIME\_FORMAT. Specifies the format for profiled time logging. Values: 'microseconds', 'milliseconds', 'seconds'. Default: 'microseconds'

 {<!-- -->AllowedTimeFormat \| string<!-- -->}


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[IMQ\_LOG\_TIME](/api/core/latest/core.imq_log_time/)


</td><td>

Environment variable IMQ\_LOG\_TIME=\[1, 0\]. Enable or disable profiled timing logging.

 {<!-- -->boolean<!-- -->}


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[IMQ\_SHUTDOWN\_TIMEOUT](/api/core/latest/core.imq_shutdown_timeout/)


</td><td>


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
